sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes, make sure both checkboxes end up checked

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Checkboxes Page - Check Checkbox 1
workflow.description: Ensure the first checkbox is checked. This state will only activate if it's currently unchecked.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
If the checkbox with label 'checkbox 1' is unchecked

workflow.name: On Checkboxes Page - Check Checkbox 2
workflow.description: Ensure the second checkbox is checked. This state will only activate if it's currently unchecked.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
If the checkbox with label 'checkbox 2' is unchecked

workflow.name: Checkboxes Confirmed Checked
workflow.description: Verify that both checkboxes are now in the checked state.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
If the checkbox with label 'checkbox 1' is checked
If the checkbox with label 'checkbox 2' is checked
